name: 任务规划
description: Create, update, resume, or complete a short multi-step task plan for complex work so the task keeps continuity across turns.

action.description: Plan action: create_or_update, get_current, advance, mark_blocked, mark_done, resume, or cancel.

goal.description: Overall task goal for this plan.

current_item_id.description: Optional id of the current plan item.

completed_item_id.description: Optional id of the item that just finished.

next_item_id.description: Optional id of the next item to run.

blocked_reason.description: Optional blocker description when the task is blocked.

items.description: Optional compact plan items. Provide 3-6 high-signal items for complex tasks.
